---
name: Epic / Roadmap
about: Plan a large feature or milestone with sub-tasks
title: "[Epic] "
labels: epic
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

What is the high-level objective of this epic?

## Motivation

Why is this important? What problem does it solve or what value does it deliver?

## Scope

What is included in this epic? What is explicitly out of scope?

### In Scope

-

### Out of Scope

-

## Sub-Tasks

Break down the work into trackable items. Link to individual issues when created.

- [ ] #  <!-- task description -->
- [ ] #
- [ ] #

## Success Criteria

How do we know this epic is done?

-

## Milestones / Timeline

| Milestone | Target Date | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
|           |             |        |

## Dependencies

Are there any blockers or dependencies on other epics/issues?

-

## Additional Context

Any references, design docs, or related discussions.
